v4_position: 0.5 page subsection in §5.3 (C2.5 causal supplement to exp007 correlational evidence)
scope: Lean MVP (C0 + C3 only, ~3 days wall clock)

design_choices_v2.hbv_implementation: self-contained HBV-Lite (Lindström 1997 / Seibert 2005), no external dependencies
design_choices_v2.basin_selection: 20 CAMELS-US basins (5 per tier centroid from exp002 671-list)
design_choices_v2.forcing_source: real CAMELS-US daymet forcings (P, T_avg, PET) — synthetic Q only, not synthetic forcings
design_choices_v2.hbv_params_source: CAMELS-US per-basin attributes (FC from soil_porosity × soil_depth_pelletier; CFMAX from frac_snow regional defaults; β/K0/K1/K2 from literature)
design_choices_v2.lstm_architecture: cudalstm, hidden=64, 30 epoch, batch=128 (matches exp002 baseline for fair head-to-head)

conditions.C0: clean forcings (no perturbation; exchangeability should hold)
conditions.C3: double perturbation: P + N(0, 0.20·μ_P) AND T + N(0, 2.0)

resource_budget: ~5h GPU (2 conditions × 20 basins × 30 epoch sequential) + ~2 days Python dev/analysis
last_updated: 2026-05-02 (closed Route A_null per D-031; null causal evidence at lean scope; exp007 carries C2.5)
result_type: Route A_null (inconclusive causal evidence; not failed)
narrative_impact: 5.3 causal sub-paragraph demoted to acknowledgement; primary C2.5 evidence remains exp007 G1 PASS
